## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ReceiptRussianRuble;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ReceiptRussianRuble { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
bill, voucher, slip, check, counterfoil, currency, rub, ₽

## Categories
finance, travel

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/receipt-russian-ruble)
